frontMatter.title: Android Arch's Room - Relation
frontMatter.summary: On the previous post, we already discussed the basic Room from AAC (Android Architecture Component). In this post, we're gonna explore the how to create a relationship between tables

prev.title: Android Arch's Room - Getting Started
prev.summary: So, on the first post we already have an introduction or more like a sneak peek to Room data access object code. Let's get our hands dirty now!

next.title: Android Arch's Room - Transaction
next.summary: Sometimes, we need more than one query to execute in one operation. Let's say you have to replace an item.
